summary: Project initialization: G1 loaded reference scaffolding from a0-messenger/a0-circuit; G2 planned file creation and git push; G3 no domain skills needed; G4 announced intent; G5 delegated to coder for all 8 files (BLUEPRINT.md, ROADMAP.md, plugin.yaml, default_config.yaml, project_knowledge.json, README.md, project.json, .gitignore), git init, GitHub repo create (falke-ai-circuit/a0-comms), and push; G6 workflow log; G7 knowledge update. All deliverables verified. Phase 0 complete.

Phase 1 - Mailbox Core: Implemented send/check/reply tool actions with JSONL storage. Created Message schema (dataclass), Mailbox helper (aiofiles store/check/get_thread), MessengerTool (Tool subclass), prompt definition, and test suite (5/5 passing). Copied plugin.yaml and default_config.yaml to plugin dir. Verified by reviewer (12/12 checks PASS).

Phase 2: Live Delivery. Created helpers/registry.py (SessionRegistry with register/unregister/get/list_active, stale detection via configurable timeout), helpers/bus.py (MessageBus with direct injection via AgentContext.communicate + async mailbox fallback), updated tools/messenger.py (added list_sessions action and registry lazy-load property). Created test_phase2_delivery.py: 7 tests covering registry operations, bus injection+fallback, messenger list_sessions. Phase 1 regression (5/5) passes unchanged.
